subject: fix(ui): remove misleading cell borders from canvas preview overlay
body:
Unselected cells on the display canvas had a faint indigo border (1px solid
rgba(99,102,241,0.15)) that looked like it would appear in the exported image,
confusing users. Changed to outline-based selection indicator that only appears
on the selected cell and on hover, keeping click-to-select functional without
visual clutter that misrepresents the export output.

Tags: ui, canvas, export
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cell-highlighting
Semver: patch
